name: Tsukishima Kei | Jealousy, jealousy
description:
Haikyuu | Time skip Au ♡ Friends to lovers

"It's... I'm just trying to make sure you don't get into trouble again. If you wanna go off on your own, then I don't care."

Tldr; Mandatory beach episode lol and Tsukishima is a jealous man

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

lets go to the BEACH BEACH lets go get away -

anyhow lol im scrimmaging my mind for new scenarios + settings bc idk, im trying to not sound too repetitive. is it working? idk. maybe once i start making more bots theyll all start to clash lOl but for now, welcome to the beach

anyway, he can be a bit mean towards you so lmk know if its too much haha i couldnt decide if i should make him sarcastic and a little pushy towards {{user}}, or if i should have made him more quiet and indifferent.

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Tsukishima

n/a

All bot scripts and initial messages are written by me! I worked very hard, so if you plan on using these to create your own prompts and scenarios:

PLEASE keep them only for PRIVATE use and DO NOT POST THEM

That's all I ask for /ᐠ╥ ˕ ╥;マ
